project.name: MSP POS Point of Sale System
project.description: ระบบบริหารจัดการร้านค้าและจุดขายสำหรับบริษัท เอ็ม เอส พี อินเตอร์ฟู้ดส์ จำกัด รองรับงานขายหน้าร้าน การจัดซื้อ การควบคุมสินค้าคงคลัง งาน CRM รายงานเชิงธุรกิจ และการซิงโครไนซ์ข้อมูลหลายสาขา โดยโครงการยังอยู่ระหว่างการพัฒนาและยังไม่ได้ Go-Live
project.scope: ครอบคลุมการพัฒนา 10 โมดูลหลัก ได้แก่ Master Data, Systems Manager, Back Office, Sale System, Purchasing System, CRM System, Inventory Control System, POS System, Reports & Dashboard และ Data Synchronization สำหรับใช้งานแบบหลายสาขา
objectives: พัฒนาระบบ POS หลายสาขาที่รองรับการขายหน้าร้านและการรับชำระเงินหลายรูปแบบ
เพิ่มประสิทธิภาพการจัดการข้อมูลหลัก การจัดซื้อ และการควบคุมสินค้าคงคลังแบบรวมศูนย์
สนับสนุนการตัดสินใจทางธุรกิจด้วยรายงาน Realtime และ Dashboard สำหรับผู้บริหาร
เตรียมระบบให้พร้อมสำหรับ UAT การฝึกอบรมผู้ใช้ และ Go-Live ตามแผนงานปี 2569
project.organization: บริษัท เอ็ม เอส พี อินเตอร์ฟู้ดส์ จำกัด (Moo Inter)

stakeholders.name: Apisit Yimboa
stakeholders.organization: บริษัท เอ็ม เอส พี อินเตอร์ฟู้ดส์ จำกัด (Moo Inter)
stakeholders.responsibility: Approve project scope, manage delivery timeline, and oversee development progress

stakeholders.name: ผู้แทนผู้ใช้งานระบบ
stakeholders.organization: บริษัท เอ็ม เอส พี อินเตอร์ฟู้ดส์ จำกัด (Moo Inter)
stakeholders.responsibility: Review requirements, participate in UAT, and validate operational workflows

stakeholders.name: ฝ่ายบริหาร
stakeholders.organization: บริษัท เอ็ม เอส พี อินเตอร์ฟู้ดส์ จำกัด (Moo Inter)
stakeholders.responsibility: Approve major decisions and support rollout readiness

milestones.name: Master Data and Systems Manager Delivery

requirements.title: Manage Master Data Across Branches
requirements.description: The system shall manage products, barcodes, prices, customers, vendors, and warehouses and support import from Excel and text files.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Authorized users can create, update, search, and import master data records without data loss.

requirements.title: Provide Role-Based System Administration
requirements.description: The system shall support at least four permission levels, system settings, promotions, discounts, backup and restore, and operational logging.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Administrators can assign roles, configure settings, and review audit logs and backup status.

requirements.title: Support POS Sales and Multi-Payment Workflows
requirements.description: The POS module shall support touchscreen operation, cash, QR PromptPay, credit card, e-Payment, and delivery platform sales transactions.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Cashier can complete an end-to-end sale and print or record a transaction for each supported payment type.

requirements.title: Control Inventory Movements and Stock Alerts
requirements.description: The inventory module shall support receiving, issuing, transfers, min/max configuration, and expiry alerts.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Warehouse users can process stock transactions and receive alerts for low stock and expiring items.

requirements.title: Support Sales Documents and Fulfillment
requirements.description: The sales system shall manage quotations, sales orders, delivery notes, tax invoices, and stock issue transactions.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Sales staff can create and track each sales document through fulfillment status.

requirements.title: Support Purchasing and Supplier Planning
requirements.description: The purchasing module shall manage purchase requisitions, purchase orders, MOQ validation, and lead-time checking.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Procurement users can generate PR and PO documents with supplier and lead-time validation.

requirements.title: Provide CRM Tracking and Loyalty Analysis
requirements.description: The CRM module shall track purchase history, loyalty points, and customer behavior analytics.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Marketing or sales users can review customer purchase trends and loyalty balances.

requirements.title: Provide Realtime Reporting and Data Synchronization
requirements.description: The system shall provide realtime reports and dashboards and synchronize branch data with headquarters automatically.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Users can view realtime dashboards and synchronized data between branches and head office with no manual intervention.

requirements.title: Support Back Office Bilingual Operations
requirements.description: The back office module shall support Thai and English language operation, automatic notifications, and email report delivery.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Users can switch language context and receive configured automated notifications and emailed reports.

design_components.name: Master Data Module
design_components.description: Centralized maintenance of product, customer, vendor, barcode, and warehouse master data

design_components.name: Systems Manager Module
design_components.description: Role-based access control, system settings, backup/restore, and audit logging

design_components.name: POS Transaction Engine
design_components.description: Touchscreen sales workflow and payment integration engine for storefront transactions
design_components.technology: .NET Core MVC + SQL Server + Payment Interfaces

design_components.name: Inventory Control Module
design_components.description: Stock receiving, issuing, transfers, and expiry monitoring

design_components.name: Sales Fulfillment Module
design_components.description: Sales documents, fulfillment, and invoicing workflow

design_components.name: Purchasing Module
design_components.description: Procurement planning and PR/PO lifecycle management

design_components.name: CRM Module
design_components.description: Customer profile, loyalty, and analytics features

design_components.name: Reports and Dashboard Module
design_components.description: Realtime operational and management reporting dashboards

design_components.name: Data Synchronization Service
design_components.description: Branch to head office realtime synchronization service

design_components.name: Back Office and Notification Module
design_components.description: Bilingual operations, notifications, and email report distribution
design_components.technology: .NET Core MVC + SQL Server + Email Service

database_tables.name: Products
database_tables.description: Stores product master data and barcode mapping

database_tables.name: Customers
database_tables.description: Stores customer master data, contact information, and loyalty references

database_tables.name: SalesTransactions
database_tables.description: Stores POS sales header and payment information

database_tables.name: PurchaseOrders
database_tables.description: Stores purchase order data and supplier lead-time references

database_tables.name: SyncQueue
database_tables.description: Stores branch synchronization queue and processing status

test_cases.title: Create and Import Master Data
test_cases.expected_result: Master data records are created and searchable after import.

test_cases.title: Assign Roles and Review Logs
test_cases.expected_result: Role assignment and system administration functions work correctly.

test_cases.title: Execute POS Sale With Multiple Payments
steps: Complete one sale using cash and one sale using QR or card
test_cases.expected_result: POS transactions are completed and recorded for each supported payment method.
test_cases.remarks: POS progress 90% and under system testing

test_cases.title: Process Inventory Receive and Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Inventory balances and alerts are updated correctly.

test_cases.title: Create Quotation to Tax Invoice Flow
test_cases.expected_result: Sales documents progress through the workflow with correct status changes.

test_cases.title: Create PR and PO With Lead-Time Validation
test_cases.expected_result: The system validates procurement rules before PO approval.

test_cases.title: Review Loyalty Point and Customer Behavior
steps: Check loyalty point balance and behavior indicators
test_cases.expected_result: CRM data is available for customer analysis.

test_cases.title: Validate Realtime Dashboard and Branch Synchronization
test_cases.preconditions: At least two branches are configured
steps: Generate sales data in branch A
Review dashboard refresh and summary metrics
test_cases.expected_result: Data is synchronized and visible on realtime dashboards.

test_cases.title: Switch Language and Send Automated Email Report
steps: Generate and send an email report
test_cases.expected_result: Back Office features work in Thai and English and email delivery is successful.

defects.title: QR PromptPay payment confirmation timeout
defects.description: Some QR payment transactions do not confirm within the expected cashier workflow time.
defects.steps_to_reproduce: Perform POS sale using QR PromptPay during peak test load.
defects.root_cause: Payment callback handling is still under refinement.

defects.title: Inventory transfer does not update destination stock immediately
defects.description: Transferred stock appears delayed in the destination warehouse balance.
defects.steps_to_reproduce: Transfer stock between warehouses and refresh the destination stock card.

defects.title: Dashboard summary widget shows incomplete branch totals
defects.description: The dashboard summary omits some branch totals when synchronization jobs are delayed.
defects.steps_to_reproduce: Simulate delayed synchronization and compare branch totals with dashboard summary.

risks.description: Inventory Control, Sale System, Reports, and Synchronization modules are not yet complete and may impact the planned UAT and launch timeline.
risks.mitigation: Prioritize critical POS and inventory workflows, review progress weekly, and freeze non-essential scope before UAT.
risks.contingency: Resequence lower-priority modules into a post-go-live enhancement release.

risks.description: Realtime branch synchronization may cause data inconsistency if conflict handling is not finalized before multi-branch rollout.
risks.mitigation: Implement sync queue monitoring, reconciliation rules, and end-to-end integration tests before launch.
risks.contingency: Fallback to scheduled synchronization for non-critical data while realtime sync issues are resolved.

risks.description: User readiness may be insufficient if training materials and UAT scenarios are not completed before the launch phase.
risks.mitigation: Prepare user manual, training record, and role-based UAT scenarios before July 2569.
risks.contingency: Extend pilot usage period and provide additional onsite support.

change_requests.title: Add delivery platform integration to POS workflow
change_requests.description: Extend POS workflow to capture and reconcile sales from delivery platform channels.
change_requests.impact: Requires integration mapping and additional test coverage for order source handling.

change_requests.title: Enhance dashboard with branch map and top-selling items
change_requests.description: Provide geographic branch view and top 10 selling products on the management dashboard.
change_requests.impact: Adds UI and reporting scope for the Reports and Dashboard module.

versions.description: Planning baseline with approved mockup and confirmed business scope.
changes: Business workflow and source data reviewed

versions.description: Foundation release with Master Data and Systems Manager ready for baseline testing.
changes: Initial database structure on SQL Server completed

versions.description: Current in-progress build for internal system testing as of 17 March 2026.
changes: REQ-008 Reports and Dashboard reached 20% progress
Data Synchronization work has not started

meetings.title: Project Planning and Mockup Review

action_items.item: Finalize mockup and obtain digital confirmation

meetings.summary: Project scope and mockup direction were reviewed and confirmed for phase 1 planning.

meetings.title: Foundation Module Delivery Review

action_items.item: Begin POS and Inventory development sprint

meetings.summary: Foundation modules were accepted for internal baseline testing and the next phase was approved.

meetings.title: Current Development Status Review
agenda: Review progress of POS, Inventory, Sale System, Reports, and Synchronization

action_items.item: Resolve priority issues in POS payment confirmation
Prepare UAT scenarios and user training materials

meetings.summary: The team reviewed the current project status and agreed to focus on stabilizing POS and inventory workflows before formal UAT.

training_sessions.title: MSP POS UAT and End-User Training

steps: Deploy latest build to development environment
Run smoke test for POS and inventory modules
deployments.rollback_plan: Restore latest database backup and redeploy previous stable build

audit.audit_scope: Pre-go-live readiness review for MSP POS Point of Sale System against ISO/IEC 29110 documentation set

findings.description: Several core modules remain incomplete and require closer milestone tracking before UAT.
Realtime data synchronization design and validation are not yet implemented while multi-branch synchronization is in project scope.
Formal training evidence and signed attendance records are not yet available because the project is still before UAT.

capas.description: Stabilize critical unfinished modules and update milestone control before UAT.
capas.root_cause: Development capacity is concentrated on multiple parallel modules with differing completion states.
capas.action_plan: Re-prioritize backlog to POS, Inventory, and Sale System; review progress weekly; defer non-critical enhancements.
capas.effectiveness_review: Critical modules should show measurable completion gains and fewer open high-priority defects.

capas.description: Complete synchronization architecture, conflict handling, and integration tests before multi-branch deployment.
capas.root_cause: Realtime synchronization work has not started despite being required in scope.
capas.action_plan: Design sync queue, define reconciliation rules, and execute end-to-end tests with at least two branches.
capas.effectiveness_review: Synchronization tests should pass and dashboard totals should match branch data.

capas.description: Prepare role-based training materials and collect formal attendance evidence before launch.
capas.root_cause: Training activities are scheduled later in the project lifecycle and have not yet produced evidence.
capas.action_plan: Finalize user manual, training plan, attendee list, and sign-off sheet before phase 6 launch activities.
capas.effectiveness_review: Signed training records and completed UAT training sessions should be available.
